notableEvents.label: Taylor Ward GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Taylor Ward grounds into a double play, third baseman Zack Gelof to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Gunnar Henderson out at 2nd. Taylor Ward out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Colton Cowser pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colton Cowser singles on a line drive to center fielder Lawrence Butler. Leody Taveras scores. Dylan Beavers scores.

notableEvents.label: Tyler O'Neill pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyler O'Neill grounds into a force out, shortstop Jacob Wilson to second baseman Jeff McNeil. Colton Cowser out at 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Colby Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colby Thomas singles on a ground ball to third baseman Coby Mayo.

notableEvents.label: Colby Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colby Thomas singles on a line drive to center fielder Leody Taveras. Shea Langeliers scores. Brent Rooker to 2nd.
